---
title: "Co-expression Network Analysis"
subtitle: "Marmoset"
doc_type: 作業報告書
author: 株式会社ダイナコム 久世、佐藤、江端
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y年%m月%d日')`"
output:
    html_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
        toc_float:    # 目次は固定にしない
          collapsed: false
        number_section: true
        pandoc_args: ["--from", "markdown+autolink_bare_uris+tex_math_single_backslash-implicit_figures"]
        self_contained: False
---

```{=html}
<!-- 
sample1
sample1
merge
Integrate

QC & preprocess
PCA / UMAP / Cluster/ CellCycle / FeatureGene / DEG

-->
```

<!-- 画像をクリックすると拡大表示するjs -->
```{js echo=FALSE}
$(function(){
  $("img:not(.lb-image)").wrap(function() {
    return "<a href='" + $(this).attr("src") + "' data-lightbox='" + $(this).attr("scr") + "'></a>";
  });
});
```

## Load Library

```{r setup, include=F ,echo =T}
setwd("/Analysis/work/")

# ライブラリ読み込み先を指定
.libPaths()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#library(monocle3)
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratData)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(zellkonverter)
library(data.table)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(magrittr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(yaml)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(Polychrome)
# co-expression network analysis packages:
library(WGCNA)
library(hdWGCNA)
library(UCell)
library(igraph)
#library(enrichR)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(GeneOverlap)
library(heatmap3)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(biomaRt)
library(readr)
library(SeuratObject)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(GOSemSim)
library(Matrix)

library(scCustomize)




enableWGCNAThreads(nThreads = 8)

set.seed(1234)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 1e12)
```

```{r Make color palet , include= FALSE}
#set.seed(1234)
palette <- createPalette(20,　seedcolors=  c("#010101", "#ff0000"), M = 1000,prefix="NA")
names(palette) <- NULL
# カラーパレットを表示します
print(palette)
# カラーパレットを視覚的に確認するためのプロット
swatch(palette)



```

## 関数定義
```{r }
## ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■
## UMAP,Feature Plot,Vln Plotを描画する関数
## ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■
plot_graph <- function(seurat_obj, dir_path) {
  
  
  p1 <- DimPlot(seurat_obj,group.by = "cluster_id", label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.5, label.size = 7)
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "integrated_UMAP.pdf")
  ggsave( p1 , file =output.file , height = 10,width = 12 )
  
  
  p2 <- DimPlot(seurat_obj, group.by = "cluster_id", split.by = "species", label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.5, ncol = 1)
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "species-cluster_UMAP.pdf")
  ggsave( p2 , file =output.file , height = 10,width = 6 )
  
  
  # 集計：クラスタごとの種別細胞数
  cluster_species_counts <- seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
    group_by(seurat_clusters, species) %>%
    summarise(count = n()) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # 描画：クラスタごとの種構成を棒グラフで表示
  p3 <- ggplot(cluster_species_counts, aes(x = factor(seurat_clusters), y = count, fill = species)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    labs(x = "Cluster", y = "Cell Count", fill = "Species",
         title = "Cluster-wise Cell Composition by Species") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "cell_count.pdf")
  ggsave( p3 , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 8 )
  
  
  # ① 各種の総細胞数を取得
  species_totals <- table(seurat_obj$species)
  
  # ② クラスタ × 種別の細胞数を集計
  cluster_species_counts <- seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
    group_by(seurat_clusters, species) %>%
    summarise(count = n()) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # ③ 種内比率で正規化
  cluster_species_counts <- cluster_species_counts %>%
    mutate(species_total = species_totals[species],
           normalized = count / species_total)
  
  # ④ 描画：種内比率ベースの積み上げ棒グラフ
  p4 <- ggplot(cluster_species_counts, aes(x = factor(seurat_clusters), y = normalized, fill = species)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    labs(x = "Cluster",
         y = "Normalized Proportion (per species)",
         fill = "Species",
         title = "Cluster Composition Normalized by Species Total") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "Normalized_cell_count.pdf")
  ggsave( p4 , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 8 )
  
  
  
  p5 <- DimPlot(seurat_obj, group.by = "species", label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.5)
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "species-integrate_UMAP.pdf")
  ggsave( p5 , file =output.file , height = 10,width = 12 )
  
  p6 <- DimPlot(seurat_obj, group.by = "species", split.by = "species", label = FALSE, pt.size = 0.5, ncol = 1)
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "species-split_UMAP.pdf")
  ggsave( p6 , file =output.file , height = 10,width = 6 )
  
  DefaultAssay(seurat_obj) <- "RNA"
  seurat_obj <- NormalizeData(seurat_obj)
  
  
  p7 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                    features = c("DPPA3", "DPPA4", "GFRA1", "SALL4"),
                    split.by = "species",
                    pt.size = 0.2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "feature_plot_group1__1.pdf")
  ggsave( p7 , file =output.file , height = 10,width = 8 )
  
  
  vln_list <- map(c("DPPA3", "DPPA4", "GFRA1", "SALL4"), ~ VlnPlot(
    seurat_obj,
    features = .x,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    split.by = "species",
    pt.size = 0
  ))
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "vln_plot_group1__1.pdf")
  
  p7_1 <- wrap_plots(vln_list, ncol = 1)
  ggsave(p7_1, file = output.file, height = 10, width = 8)


  
  
  
  p8 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                    features = c("ETV5", "ID4" ,"HES1"),
                    split.by = "species",
                    pt.size = 0.2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "feature_plot_group1__2.pdf")
  ggsave( p8 , file =output.file , height = 7.5,width = 8 )
  
  vln_list <- map(c("ETV5", "ID4" ,"HES1"), ~ VlnPlot(
    seurat_obj,
    features = .x,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    split.by = "species",
    pt.size = 0
  ))
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "vln_plot_group1__2.pdf")
  
  p8_1 <- wrap_plots(vln_list, ncol = 1)
  ggsave(p8_1, file = output.file, height = 7.5, width = 8)
  
  

  
  
  
  p9 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                    features = c("ID4", "HES1"),
                    split.by = "species",
                    pt.size = 0.2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "feature_plot_group1_0A.pdf")
  ggsave( p9 , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 8 )
  
  vln_list <- map(c("ID4", "HES1"), ~ VlnPlot(
    seurat_obj,
    features = .x,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    split.by = "species",
    pt.size = 0
  ))
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "vln_plot_group1_0A.pdf")
  
  p9_1 <- wrap_plots(vln_list, ncol = 1)
  ggsave(p9_1, file = output.file, height = 5, width = 8)
  
  
  p10 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                    features = c("ENO3", "A2M", "FGFR3"),
                    split.by = "species",
                    pt.size = 0.2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "feature_plot_group0A.pdf")
  ggsave( p10 , file =output.file , height = 7.5,width = 8 ) 
  
  vln_list <- map(c("ENO3", "A2M", "FGFR3"), ~ VlnPlot(
    seurat_obj,
    features = .x,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    split.by = "species",
    pt.size = 0
  ))
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "vln_plot_group0A.pdf")
  
  p10_1 <- wrap_plots(vln_list, ncol = 1)
  ggsave(p10_1, file = output.file, height = 7.5, width = 8)
  
  
  
  p11 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                    features = c("NANOS2", "DND1", "UTF1", "SPOCD1"),
                    split.by = "species",
                    pt.size = 0.2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "feature_plot_group0B.pdf")
  ggsave( p11 , file =output.file , height = 10,width = 8 )  
  
  vln_list <- map(c("NANOS2", "DND1", "UTF1", "SPOCD1"), ~ VlnPlot(
    seurat_obj,
    features = .x,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    split.by = "species",
    pt.size = 0
  ))
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "vln_plot_group0B.pdf")
  
  p11_1 <- wrap_plots(vln_list, ncol = 1)
  ggsave(p11_1, file = output.file, height = 10, width = 8)
  

  
  p12 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                    features = c("EGR4", "PIWIL4", "TSPAN33"),
                    split.by = "species",
                    pt.size = 0.2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "feature_plot_group0.pdf")
  ggsave( p12 , file =output.file , height = 7.5,width = 8 )  
  
  vln_list <- map(c("EGR4", "PIWIL4", "TSPAN33"), ~ VlnPlot(
    seurat_obj,
    features = .x,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    split.by = "species",
    pt.size = 0
  ))
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "vln_plot_group0.pdf")
  
  p12_1 <- wrap_plots(vln_list, ncol = 1)
  ggsave(p12_1, file = output.file, height = 7.5, width = 8)
  
  
  
  p13 <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
                    features = c("KIT", "ZEB2", "NANOS3"),
                    split.by = "species",
                    pt.size = 0.2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )

  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "feature_plot_differentiation.pdf")
  ggsave( p13 , file =output.file , height = 7.5,width = 8 ) 
  
  
  vln_list <- map(c("KIT", "ZEB2", "NANOS3"), ~ VlnPlot(
    seurat_obj,
    features = .x,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    split.by = "species",
    pt.size = 0
  ))
  
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "vln_plot_differentiation.pdf")
  
  p13_1 <- wrap_plots(vln_list, ncol = 1)
  ggsave(p13_1, file = output.file, height = 7.5, width = 8)
  
  
  
  p<- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj, features = c("S.Score","G2M.Score") , ncol=2 , pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("grey", "red") ) 
  output.file <- file.path(dir_path, "S_G2M_score.pdf")

  ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 11 )
  
  plot_gene <- c("MKI67","CDKN1B")
  p<- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj, features =plot_gene , ncol=2 , 
                  pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("grey", "red") , slot = "data" ,max.cutoff = 1) 
  p
  output.file = paste0( dir_path, "/FeaturePlot_CellCycle_Gene.pdf" )
  ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 11 )
  
  
  
  
  
  
}

```


```{r}
dir_path <- "/Analysis/work/work_sato/result/out_marge_human_marmoset/integration_condition/nfeatures_2000_method_SCT/UMAP_condition/mindist_0.1_nneighbors_30"
save_path <- "/Analysis/work/work_sato/result/human_marmoset_graph"
combined <- readRDS(file.path(dir_path, "combined.rds"))
```




```{r ReadYAML, include=TRUE}

# ディレクトリの存在を確認し、存在しない場合は作成
if (!dir.exists(save_path)) {
  dir.create(save_path, recursive = TRUE)
  message("ディレクトリを作成しました: ", save_path)
} else {
  message("output ディレクトリは既に存在します: ", save_path)
}

```


```{r}
plot_graph(combined, save_path)
```

# qualityの確認
```{r}

human_obj <- readRDS("/Analysis/work/out_Human_remove45yr/SeuratOBJ_ForescapePlot.rds")
marmoset_obj <- readRDS("/Analysis/work/forPlot_data/SeuratOBJ_Forescape_Marmoset.rds")
macaque_obj <- readRDS("/Analysis/work/forPlot_data/SeuratOBJ_Forescape_macaque_v2_res0.5_remove_doublet_cluster.rds")


DimPlot(combined)
DefaultAssay(combined) <- "integrated"

human <- subset(combined, species == "human")
mt_genes_h <- grep("^MT-", rownames(human), value = TRUE)
mt_counts_h <- Matrix::colSums(human@assays$RNA@layers$counts.1[mt_genes_h, ])
total_counts_h <- Matrix::colSums(human@assays$RNA@layers$counts.1)
human$percent.mt <- mt_counts_h / total_counts_h * 100

marmo <- subset(combined, species == "marmoset")
mt_genes_m <- grep("^mt-", rownames(marmo), value = TRUE)
mt_counts_m <- Matrix::colSums(marmo@assays$RNA@layers$counts.2[mt_genes_m, ])
total_counts_m <- Matrix::colSums(marmo@assays$RNA@layers$counts.2)
marmo$percent.mt <- mt_counts_m / total_counts_m * 100

combined <- merge(human, marmo)


p <- ggplot(combined@meta.data,
       aes(x = seurat_clusters, y = nFeature_RNA, fill = species)) +
  geom_violin(trim = TRUE, scale = "width") +
  facet_wrap(~ species, ncol = 1) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white")
  )

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "nFeature_RNA_human_marmoset.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 6, width = 8 )




p <- ggplot(combined@meta.data,
       aes(x = seurat_clusters, y = nCount_RNA, fill = species)) +
  geom_violin(trim = TRUE, scale = "width") +
  facet_wrap(~ species, ncol = 1) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white")
  )

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "nCount_RNA_human_marmoset.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 6, width = 8 )


p <- ggplot(macaque_obj@meta.data,
       aes(x = seurat_clusters, y = nFeature_RNA, fill = seurat_clusters)) +
  geom_violin(trim = TRUE, scale = "width") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "nFeature_RNA_macaque.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 4, width = 8 )


p <- ggplot(macaque_obj@meta.data,
       aes(x = seurat_clusters, y = nCount_RNA, fill = seurat_clusters)) +
  geom_violin(trim = TRUE, scale = "width") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "nCount_RNA_macaque.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 4, width = 8 )




```

# Fig1Aのグラフ作成
```{r}
p <- DimPlot(combined, label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.5, label.size = 7, cols = palette)+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
  )

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "DimPlot_combined.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 6, width = 8 )

p <- DimPlot(combined, group.by = "species", split.by = "species",pt.size = 0.5)+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
  )

p <- DimPlot(combined, group.by = "species", pt.size = 0.5)+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
  )

# 重なりをランダム化
p <- DimPlot(
  combined,
  group.by = "species",
  pt.size = 0.1,
  cells = sample(colnames(combined))   # ← ランダムに並び替え
) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
  )

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "DimPlot_species.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 6, width = 8 )


```




# Fig1Bのグラフ作成
```{r}
DefaultAssay(combined) <- "RNA"
combined <- NormalizeData(combined)

features <- c("EGR4", "TSPAN33", "PIWIL4" ,"GFRA1", "HES1", "ETV5", "ID4","FGFR3","A2M","NANOS2", "DND1", "SPOCD1", "DPPA3", "DPPA4", "SALL4", "UTF1", "KIT", "ZEB2", "NANOS3", "DNMT3L")
p <- FeaturePlot(combined,
                  features = features,
                  split.by = "species",
                  pt.size = 0.2
                  ) &
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()
  )

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "FeaturePlot_marker_gene_combined.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 42,width = 8 )


# 1ページ目

features <- c("NANOS2", "DND1", "SPOCD1", "EGR4", "TSPAN33", "PIWIL4")

p <- FeaturePlot(
  combined,
  split.by = "species",
  features = features,
  pt.size = 0.001,
  order = TRUE
) &scale_color_viridis(option = "turbo", alpha = 0.8) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_blank()
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")   # ← レジェンドを消す

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "FeaturePlot_marker_gene.pdf")
ggsave(p, file = output.file, height = 10, width = 6, dpi = 600)



p <- FeaturePlot(
  combined,
  split.by = "species",
  features = features,
  pt.size = 0.001,
  order = FALSE
) &
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_blank()
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")   # ← レジェンドを消す

output.file <- file.path(save_path, "FeaturePlot_marker_gene.pdf")
ggsave(p, file = output.file, height = 10, width = 6, dpi = 600)


marmoset_only_obj <- subset(combined, species == "marmoset")
features <- c("EGR4", "PIWIL4", "HES1")

# 発現行列を取得（data slot）
mat <- GetAssayData(marmoset_only_obj, slot = "data")[features, ]

# 発現している細胞（>0）を TRUE/FALSE で判定
expr_binary <- mat > 0

# 各遺伝子の発現割合を計算
percent_expr <- colMeans(t(expr_binary)) * 100

percent_expr





```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

# --- マーカー遺伝子の指定 ---
features <- c("EGR4", "TSPAN33", "PIWIL4", "FGFR3","A2M", "GFRA1", "HES1", "ETV5", "ID4","NANOS2", "DND1", "SPOCD1", "DPPA3", "DPPA4", "SALL4", "UTF1", "KIT", "ZEB2", "NANOS3", "ZPBP", "PRM2", "VIM", "INSL3", "ACTA2", "IL1B","MKI67","CDKN1A","CDKN1B","CDKN1C")

DefaultAssay(combined) <- "RNA"

# --- グループラベルの定義 ---
group_labels <- c(
  rep("State 0", 3),
  rep("State 0A",2),
  rep("State 1", 4),
  rep("State 0B", 3),
  rep("Stem cell", 4),
  rep("Differentiation", 3),
  "Spermatocyte", "Spermatid",
  "Somatic cells", "Leydig cell", "Myoid", "Macrophage","proliferating", rep("dormant",3)
)

# --- 共通描画関数 ---
make_dotplot <- function(seurat_obj, features, group_labels, title = NULL) {
  dot <- DotPlot(seurat_obj, features = features, cols = c("lightgrey", "red"))
  
  gene_levels <- levels(dot$data$features.plot)
  cell_levels <- levels(dot$data$id)
  
  dot$data$group <- factor(group_labels, levels = unique(group_labels))
  dot$data$gene  <- factor(dot$data$features.plot, levels = gene_levels)
  
  group_tile <- unique(dot$data[, c("gene", "group")])
  group_tile$id <- "GroupBand"
  
  y_levels <- c("GroupBand", cell_levels)
  y_labels <- c("GroupBand" = "", setNames(cell_levels, cell_levels))
  
  p <- ggplot(dot$data, aes(x = gene, y = id)) +
    geom_tile(data = group_tile, aes(x = gene, y = id, fill = group), height = 0.8) +
    geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = y_levels, labels = y_labels) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "lightgrey", high = "red") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "State 0"        = "#F8766D",
      "State 0A"       = "#D89000",
      "State 1"        = "#E69F00",
      "State 0B"       = "#A3A500",
      "Stem cell"      = "#39B600",
      "Differentiation"= "#00BF7D",
      "Spermatocyte"   = "#00BFC4",
      "Spermatid"      = "#00B0F6",
      "Somatic cells"  = "#9590FF",
      "Leydig cell"    = "#E76BF3",
      "Myoid"          = "#FF62BC",
      "Macrophage"     = "#B79F00",
      "proliferating"  = "#7CAE00",
      "dormant"        = "#C77CFF"
    ))+
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(title = "avg.exp.scaled", order = 1),
      size  = guide_legend(title = "pct.exp", order = 2),
      fill  = guide_legend(title = "Gene group", override.aes = list(shape = 22), order = 3)
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, angle = 315, hjust = 0),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    labs(x = "Gene", y = "Cluster", title = title)
  
  return(p)
}

# --- combined全体 ---
p_combined <- make_dotplot(combined, features, group_labels, title = "Combined (Human + Marmoset)")
ggsave(p_combined, file = file.path(save_path, "DotPlot_combined.pdf"), height = 8, width = 12)

# --- Humanのみ ---
combined_human <- subset(combined, subset = species == "human")
combined_human <- NormalizeData(combined_human)
p_human <- make_dotplot(combined_human, features, group_labels, title = "Human")
output.file <- file.path(save_path, "DotPlot_marker_gene_combined_human.pdf")
ggsave(p_human, file = output.file, height = 8, width = 12)

# --- Marmosetのみ ---
combined_marmoset <- subset(combined, subset = species == "marmoset")
combined_marmoset <- NormalizeData(combined_marmoset)
p_marmoset <- make_dotplot(combined_marmoset, features, group_labels, title = "Marmoset")
output.file <- file.path(save_path, "DotPlot_marker_gene_combined_marmoset.pdf")
ggsave(p_marmoset, file = output.file, height = 8, width = 12)


# --- Macaqueのみ ---


group_labels <- c(
  rep("State 0", 3),
  rep("State 0A",1),
  rep("State 1", 4),
  rep("State 0B", 3),
  rep("Stem cell", 2),
  rep("Differentiation", 2),
  "Spermatocyte", "Spermatid",
  "Somatic cells", "Leydig cell", "Myoid", "Macrophage","proliferating", rep("dormant",3)
)   


macaque_obj <- NormalizeData(macaque_obj)
p_human <- make_dotplot(macaque_obj, features, group_labels, title = "macaque")
output.file <- file.path(save_path, "DotPlot_marker_gene_macaque.pdf")
ggsave(p_human, file = output.file, height = 8, width = 12)
```

# Fig1Cのグラフ作成
```{r}

features <- c("EGR4", "TSPAN33", "PIWIL4" ,"GFRA1", "HES1", "ETV5", "ID4","FGFR3","A2M","NANOS2", "DND1", "SPOCD1", "DPPA3", "DPPA4", "SALL4", "UTF1", "KIT", "ZEB2", "NANOS3", "ZPBP", "PRM2", "VIM", "INSL3", "ACTA2", "IL1B","MKI67","CDKN1A","CDKN1B","CDKN1C")
DefaultAssay(combined) <- "RNA"

group_labels <- c(
  rep("State 0", 3),
  rep("State 0A/1", 6),
  rep("State 0B", 3),
  rep("Stem cell", 4),
  rep("Differentiation", 3),
  "Spermatocyte", "Spermatid",
  "Somatic cells", "Leydig cell", "Myoid", "Macrophage","proliferating", rep("dormant",3)
)



# DotPlot の作成
dot <- DotPlot(combined, features = features, cols = c("lightgrey", "red"))

# 遺伝子順と細胞群順を取得
gene_levels <- levels(dot$data$features.plot)
cell_levels <- levels(dot$data$id)

# グループ情報を結合
dot$data$group <- factor(group_labels, levels = unique(group_labels))
dot$data$gene <- factor(dot$data$features.plot, levels = gene_levels)

# グループ帯データ（1遺伝子1行）
group_tile <- unique(dot$data[, c("gene", "group")])
group_tile$id <- "GroupBand"  # ダミーy軸ラベル

# y軸ラベルにダミーを追加（下に表示されるように）
y_levels <- c("GroupBand", cell_levels)
y_labels <- c("GroupBand" = "", setNames(cell_levels, cell_levels))

# プロット再構築
p <- ggplot(dot$data, aes(x = gene, y = id)) +
  geom_tile(data = group_tile, aes(x = gene, y = id, fill = group), height = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = y_levels, labels = y_labels) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "lightgrey", high = "red") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "State 0"        = "#F8766D",
    "State 0A/1"     = "#D89000",
    "State 0B"       = "#A3A500",
    "Stem cell"      = "#39B600",
    "Differentiation"= "#00BF7D",
    "Spermatocyte"   = "#00BFC4",
    "Spermatid"      = "#00B0F6",
    "Somatic cells"  = "#9590FF",
    "Leydig cell"    = "#E76BF3",
    "Myoid"          = "#FF62BC",
    "Macrophage"     = "#B79F00",
    "proliferating"  = "#7CAE00",   
    "dormant"        = "#C77CFF"  
  )) +
  guides(
    color = guide_colorbar(title = "avg.exp.scaled", order = 1),
    size  = guide_legend(title = "pct.exp", order = 2),
    fill  = guide_legend(title = "Gene group", override.aes = list(shape = 22), order = 3)
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, angle = 315, hjust = 0),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Gene", y = "Cluster")



output.file <- file.path(save_path, "DotPlot_marker_gene.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 8,width = 12 )


# humanのみのDotPlot
combined_human <- subset(combined, subset = species == "human")
combined_human <- NormalizeData(combined_human)
dot_human <- DotPlot(combined_human, features = features, cols = c("lightgrey", "red")) +
  ggtitle("Human")



```


# Fig1Dのグラフ作成
```{r}

DefaultAssay(combined) <- "SCT"

p <- FeaturePlot(combined, split.by = "species", features = c("S.Score","G2M.Score") , ncol=2 , pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("blue","grey", "red") )+
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
    )
output.file <- file.path(save_path, "FeaturePlot_cell_cycle_score_species.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 8,width = 8 )


p <- FeaturePlot(combined, split.by = "species", features = c("MKI67","CDKN1A","CDKN1B","CDKN1C") , ncol=2 , pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("grey", "red") )+
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
    )
output.file <- file.path(save_path, "FeaturePlot_cell_cycle_gene_species.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 15,width = 8 )


p <- FeaturePlot(combined, features = c("S.Score","G2M.Score") , ncol=2 , pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("blue", "grey", "red") )+
    theme(,
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
    )
output.file <- file.path(save_path, "FeaturePlot_cell_cycle_score_combined.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 4.5,width = 10 )


p <- FeaturePlot(combined, features = c("MKI67","CDKN1A","CDKN1B","CDKN1C") , ncol=2 , pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("grey", "red") )+
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
    )
output.file <- file.path(save_path, "FeaturePlot_cell_cycle_gene_combined.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 8,width = 10 )

```

###########
# 生物種個別に描画
###########


```{r}
human_obj <- readRDS("/Analysis/work/out_Human_remove45yr/SeuratOBJ_ForescapePlot.rds")
marmoset_obj <- readRDS("/Analysis/work/forPlot_data/SeuratOBJ_Forescape_Marmoset.rds")
macaque_obj <- readRDS("/Analysis/work/forPlot_data/SeuratOBJ_Forescape_macaque_v2_res0.5_remove_doublet_cluster.rds")

species_list <- list(human = human_obj, marmoset = marmoset_obj, macaque = macaque_obj)

```

# Fig1Aのグラフ作成
```{r}
for (species in names(species_list)) {
  obj <- species_list[[species]]
  p <- DimPlot(obj, label = TRUE, pt.size = 0.5, label.size = 7, cols = palette)+
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
    )
  
  output.file <- file.path(save_path, paste0("DimPlot", "_", species,".pdf"))
  ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 6, width = 8 )
  
  }

```


# Fig1Bのグラフ作成
```{r}

for (species in names(species_list)) {
  obj <- species_list[[species]]

  DefaultAssay(obj) <- "RNA"
  obj <- NormalizeData(obj)
  features <- c("EGR4", "TSPAN33", "PIWIL4" ,"GFRA1", "HES1", "ETV5", "ID4","FGFR3","A2M","NANOS2", "DND1", "SPOCD1", "DPPA3", "DPPA4", "SALL4", "UTF1", "KIT", "ZEB2", "NANOS3", "DNMT3L")

  p <- FeaturePlot(obj,
                    features = features,
                    pt.size = 0.2,
                    ncol = 2
                    ) & 
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
  
  output.file <- file.path(save_path, paste0("FeaturePlot_marker_gene_",species,".pdf"))
  ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 22.5,width = 8 )
}
```



# Fig1Bのグラフ(マカク)作成
```{r}

obj <- species_list[["macaque"]]

DefaultAssay(obj) <- "RNA"
obj <- NormalizeData(obj)

features <- c("HES1","SPOCD1","KIT", "ETV5","EGR4","ZEB2", "ID4","TSPAN33","NANOS3","UTF1","SALL4", "DPPA4","RHOXF1","YBX3","ZBTB16","SALL4","NKX6-2","ZNF395","MLLT6","POU3F1","BARHL2","SOX9", "ARID5B")
p <- FeaturePlot(obj,
                  features = features,
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  ncol = 3
                  ) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks   = element_blank(),
    axis.line    = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    panel.grid   = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"  # ← 凡例を消す
  )
output.file <- file.path(save_path, paste0("FeaturePlot_marker_gene_macaque.pdf"))
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 18.5,width = 8 )

```

# Fig1Cのグラフ作成
```{r}

features <- c("EGR4", "TSPAN33", "PIWIL4" ,"GFRA1", "HES1", "ETV5", "ID4","FGFR3","A2M","NANOS2", "DND1", "SPOCD1", "DPPA3", "DPPA4", "SALL4", "UTF1", "KIT", "ZEB2", "NANOS3", "ZPBP", "PRM2", "VIM", "INSL3", "ACTA2", "IL1B","MKI67","CDKN1A","CDKN1B","CDKN1C")

for (species in names(species_list)) {
  obj <- species_list[[species]]
  DefaultAssay(obj) <- "RNA"
  obj <- NormalizeData(obj)

  DefaultAssay(obj) <- "RNA"
  
  group_labels <- c(
    rep("State 0", 3),
    rep("State 0A/1", 6),
    rep("State 0B", 3),
    rep("Stem cell", 4),
    rep("Differentiation", 3),
    "Spermatocyte", "Spermatid",
    "Somatic cells", "Leydig cell", "Myoid", "Macrophage","proliferating", rep("dormant",3)
  )
  
  if (species == "macaque"){
    group_labels <- c(
      rep("State 0", 3),
      rep("State 0A/1", 5),
      rep("State 0B", 3),
      rep("Stem cell", 2),
      rep("Differentiation", 3),
      "Spermatid",
      "Somatic cells", "Leydig cell", "Myoid", "Macrophage"
    )    
  }
  
  # DotPlot の作成
  dot <- DotPlot(obj, features = features, cols = c("lightgrey", "red"))
  
  # 遺伝子順と細胞群順を取得
  gene_levels <- levels(dot$data$features.plot)
  cell_levels <- levels(dot$data$id)
  
  # グループ情報を結合
  dot$data$group <- factor(group_labels, levels = unique(group_labels))
  dot$data$gene <- factor(dot$data$features.plot, levels = gene_levels)
  
  # グループ帯データ（1遺伝子1行）
  group_tile <- unique(dot$data[, c("gene", "group")])
  group_tile$id <- "GroupBand"  # ダミーy軸ラベル
  
  # y軸ラベルにダミーを追加（下に表示されるように）
  y_levels <- c("GroupBand", cell_levels)
  y_labels <- c("GroupBand" = "", setNames(cell_levels, cell_levels))
  
  # プロット再構築
  p <- ggplot(dot$data, aes(x = gene, y = id)) +
    geom_tile(data = group_tile, aes(x = gene, y = id, fill = group), height = 0.8) +
    geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = y_levels, labels = y_labels) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "lightgrey", high = "red") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "State 0"        = "#F8766D",
      "State 0A/1"     = "#D89000",
      "State 0B"       = "#A3A500",
      "Stem cell"      = "#39B600",
      "Differentiation"= "#00BF7D",
      "Spermatocyte"   = "#00BFC4",
      "Spermatid"      = "#00B0F6",
      "Somatic cells"  = "#9590FF",
      "Leydig cell"    = "#E76BF3",
      "Myoid"          = "#FF62BC",
      "Macrophage"     = "#B79F00",
      "proliferating"  = "#7CAE00",   
      "dormant"        = "#C77CFF"  
    ))  +
    guides(
      color = guide_colorbar(title = "avg.exp.scaled", order = 1),
      size  = guide_legend(title = "pct.exp", order = 2),
      fill  = guide_legend(title = "Gene group", override.aes = list(shape = 22), order = 3)
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, angle = 315, hjust = 0),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    labs(x = "Gene", y = "Cluster")
  
  output.file <- file.path(save_path, paste0("DotPlot_marker_gene_",species,".pdf"))
  ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 8,width = 12 )
}

```
# Fig1Dのグラフ作成
```{r}

for (species in names(species_list)) {
  obj <- species_list[[species]]
  
  s.genes <- cc.genes$s.genes
  g2m.genes <- cc.genes$g2m.genes
  DefaultAssay(obj) <- "RNA"
  obj <- NormalizeData(obj)
  
  obj <- CellCycleScoring(obj,
                          s.features = s.genes,
                          g2m.features = g2m.genes, 
                          set.ident = TRUE)

  p <- FeaturePlot(obj, features = c("S.Score","G2M.Score") , ncol=2 , pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("blue", "grey", "red") )+
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
      )
  
  output.file <- file.path(save_path, paste0("FeaturePlot_cell_cycle_score_",species,".pdf"))
  ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 4.5,width = 10 )
  
  
  
    p <- FeaturePlot(obj, features = c("MKI67","CDKN1A","CDKN1B","CDKN1C") , ncol=2 , pt.size = 0.01 ,cols = c("grey", "red") )+
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13)
      )
  
  output.file <- file.path(save_path, paste0("FeaturePlot_cell_cycle_gene_",species,".pdf"))
  ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 9,width = 10 )
  
}

```

#####################
# BrdUグラフ作成
####################

```{r}
library(zoo)

save_dir <- "/Analysis/work/work_sato/result/brdu"
data_dir <- "/Analysis/work/data/brdu"


##################
# marmoset1
##################
data_path <- file.path(data_dir, "marmoset1.csv")

df <- read.csv(data_path, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)

# long形式に変換
df_long <- pivot_longer(df, cols = c(`DND1(+)`,`PIWIL4(+)`,`DPPA4(+)`),
                        names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Percent")

# Geneごとに線形補間
df_long_interp <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  mutate(Percent_interp = na.approx(Percent, x = week, na.rm = FALSE),
         is_imputed = is.na(Percent))  # 補間されたかどうかを記録

p <- ggplot(df_long_interp, aes(x = week)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Percent_interp), color = "#333333", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(df_long_interp, !is_imputed),  # 補間されていない元データのみ
    aes(y = Percent_interp),
    color = "#333333", fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3
  ) +
  facet_grid(Gene ~ ., scales = "fixed", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, max(df_long$week))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey70", fill = NA, size = 1),
        strip.placement = "outside") +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "", title = "")

print(p)

output.file <- file.path(save_dir, "Brdu_marmoset1.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 7,width = 10 )


##################
# marmoset2
##################
data_path <- file.path(data_dir, "marmoset2.csv")

df <- read.csv(data_path, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)

# long形式に変換
df_long <- pivot_longer(df, cols = c(`DND1(+)`,`PIWIL4(+) DPPA4(-)`,`PIWIL4(+) DPPA4(+)`),
                        names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Percent")

# Geneごとに線形補間
df_long_interp <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  mutate(Percent_interp = na.approx(Percent, x = week, na.rm = FALSE),
         is_imputed = is.na(Percent))  # 補間されたかどうかを記録

p <- ggplot(df_long_interp, aes(x = week)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Percent_interp), color = "#333333", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(df_long_interp, !is_imputed),  # 補間されていない元データのみ
    aes(y = Percent_interp),
    color = "#333333", fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3
  ) +
  facet_grid(Gene ~ ., scales = "fixed", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, max(df_long$week))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey70", fill = NA, size = 1),
        strip.placement = "outside") +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "", title = "")

print(p)

output.file <- file.path(save_dir, "Brdu_marmoset2.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 7,width = 10 )




##################
# macaque1
##################
data_path <- file.path(data_dir, "macaque1.csv")

df <- read.csv(data_path, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)



# long形式に変換
df_long <- pivot_longer(df, cols = c(`DNMT3L(+)`,`DND1(+)`,`PIWIL4(+)`),
                        names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Percent")

# Geneごとに線形補間
df_long_interp <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  mutate(Percent_interp = na.approx(Percent, x = week, na.rm = FALSE),
         is_imputed = is.na(Percent))  # 補間されたかどうかを記録

p <- ggplot(df_long_interp, aes(x = week)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Percent_interp), color = "#333333", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(df_long_interp, !is_imputed),  # 補間されていない元データのみ
    aes(y = Percent_interp),
    color = "#333333", fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3
  ) +
  facet_grid(Gene ~ ., scales = "fixed", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, max(df_long$week))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey70", fill = NA, size = 1),
        strip.placement = "outside") +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "", title = "")

print(p)

output.file <- file.path(save_dir, "Brdu_macaque1.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 7,width = 10 )



##################
# macaque2
##################
data_path <- file.path(data_dir, "macaque2.csv")

df <- read.csv(data_path, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)



# long形式に変換
df_long <- pivot_longer(df, cols = c(`PIWIL4(-) DNMT3L(+)`,`PIWIL4(+) DNMT3L(+)`,`PIWIL4(+) DNMT3L(-)`),
                        names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Percent")

# Geneごとに線形補間
df_long_interp <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  mutate(Percent_interp = na.approx(Percent, x = week, na.rm = FALSE),
         is_imputed = is.na(Percent))  # 補間されたかどうかを記録

p <- ggplot(df_long_interp, aes(x = week)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Percent_interp), color = "#333333", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(df_long_interp, !is_imputed),  # 補間されていない元データのみ
    aes(y = Percent_interp),
    color = "#333333", fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3
  ) +
  facet_grid(Gene ~ ., scales = "fixed", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, max(df_long$week))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey70", fill = NA, size = 1),
        strip.placement = "outside") +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "", title = "")

print(p)

output.file <- file.path(save_dir, "Brdu_macaque2.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 7,width = 10 )



##################
# macaque_accumulation
##################
data_path <- file.path(data_dir, "macaque_accumulation.csv")
df <- read.csv(data_path, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)

df <- df %>% 
  dplyr::filter(week <= 14)



# long形式に変換
df_long <- pivot_longer(df, cols = c(`DND1(+)`,`PIWIL4(+)`),
                        names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Percent")

# Geneごとに線形補間
df_long_interp <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  mutate(Percent_interp = na.approx(Percent, x = week, na.rm = FALSE),
         is_imputed = is.na(Percent))  # 補間されたかどうかを記録

p <- ggplot(df_long_interp, aes(x = week)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Percent_interp), color = "#333333", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(df_long_interp, !is_imputed),  # 補間されていない元データのみ
    aes(y = Percent_interp),
    color = "#333333", fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3
  ) +
  facet_grid(Gene ~ ., scales = "fixed", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, max(df_long$week))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey70", fill = NA, size = 1),
        strip.placement = "outside") +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "", title = "")

print(p)

output.file <- file.path(save_dir, "Brdu_macaque_accumulation.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )


##################
# marmoset_accumulation
##################
data_path <- file.path(data_dir, "marmoset_accumulation.csv")
df <- read.csv(data_path, header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)

df <- df %>% 
  dplyr::filter(week <= 13)



# long形式に変換
df_long <- pivot_longer(df, cols = c(`DND1(+)`,`PIWIL4(+)`),
                        names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Percent")

# Geneごとに線形補間
df_long_interp <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Gene) %>%
  mutate(Percent_interp = na.approx(Percent, x = week, na.rm = FALSE),
         is_imputed = is.na(Percent))  # 補間されたかどうかを記録

p <- ggplot(df_long_interp, aes(x = week)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Percent_interp), color = "#333333", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(df_long_interp, !is_imputed),  # 補間されていない元データのみ
    aes(y = Percent_interp),
    color = "#333333", fill = "white", shape = 21, size = 3
  ) +
  facet_grid(Gene ~ ., scales = "fixed", switch = "y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, max(df_long$week))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey70", fill = NA, size = 1),
        strip.placement = "outside") +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "", title = "")

print(p)

output.file <- file.path(save_dir, "Brdu_marmoset_accumulation.pdf")
ggsave( p , file =output.file , height = 5,width = 10 )



```
